prompt:
Solve an employee churn prediction task using the IBM HR Analytics Employee Attrition & Performance dataset.

1. Input: Load "WA_Fn-UseC_-HR-Employee-Attrition.csv". Handle missing/anomalous values, encode categoricals, scale numericals, address class imbalance with SMOTE.
2. Feature Engineering: Select and create relevant features.
3. Split into data/train_set.csv and data/test_set.csv.
4. Build a Random Forest model with hyperparameter tuning (grid/random search). Save to models/random_forest_model.pkl.
5. Evaluate: accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, ROC-AUC. Save predictions to results/predictions.csv and metrics to results/evaluation_metrics.csv.
6. Report: Generate reports/model_report.pdf with preprocessing steps, feature engineering, model tuning, evaluation results, feature importance plots, ROC curves, confusion matrices, and business implications.
expected: 1. Data exploration: Feature Selection Impact. 2. Predictive modeling: Model Accuracy + F1 Score — Random Forest with SMOTE and hyperparameter tuning. 3. Report: Report Completeness Score — model_report.pdf with visualizations and business implications.
